projectName: JyPS - Sistema de Justificantes y Pases de Salida
projectDescription: A role-based web SPA for managing employee exit passes and absence justifications, with approval workflows and QR code validation for institutional access control.
keyFeatures: Role-based access control with five distinct user panels (Administrator, Area Manager, HR, Employee, Security Guard)
Exit pass request and approval workflow with QR code generation
Absence justification submission and HR review system
Real-time multi-criteria filtering for users and requests
QR code scanning and manual code validation for physical access control
Account lockout security after failed login attempts
Responsive SPA design built with React 19 and Tailwind CSS 4
Clean Architecture pattern with separated view, domain, and infrastructure layers
publicApiSurface: useApi() — centralized HTTP hook: request(endpoint, method, body)
useUsuarios() — user domain hook: crearUsuario(formData), obtenerUsuarios()
